h1 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; text-align: center; font-size: 3rem; color: #1a1a1a; margin-bottom: 10px; font-weight: 400; }
.cart-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 0.8fr; gap: 40px; align-items: start; }
.card-panel { background: #fff; padding: 40px; border-radius: 2px; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.05); margin-bottom: 30px; }
.cart-table th { padding: 15px; text-align: left; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 2px; font-weight: 500; }
.cart-table td { padding: 20px 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; font-size: 0.9rem; color: #333; }
.qty-btn { background: #f0f0f0; border: none; width: 25px; height: 25px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 4px; transition: 0.3s; }
.total-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 10px; font-size: 0.95rem; }
.total-row.grand-total { margin-top: 15px; font-size: 1.6rem; color: #e8b4b8; font-weight: 700; border-top: 1px solid #eee; padding-top: 15px; }

.btn-checkout { display: block; width: 100%; background: #1a1a1a; color: #fff; text-align: center; padding: 18px; text-decoration: none; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 3px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.85rem; transition: 0.4s; margin-top: 30px; }
